questions.question: What are the advantages of using expression trees over direct string evaluation of expressions?
keyPoints: Easy generation of different notations (prefix, infix, postfix)

questions.question: Explain the process of building an expression tree from postfix notation with an example.
keyPoints: Use stack data structure for construction
For operators: pop two nodes, make them children, push new node

questions.question: Compare and contrast the three different traversals of expression trees and their outputs.
keyPoints: Postorder: produces postfix notation (Reverse Polish notation)

questions.question: Describe the complete process of evaluating an expression tree with a suitable example.
keyPoints: Recursive evaluation: left subtree, right subtree, then root
Internal nodes apply operator to results from children

questions.question: Implement a C program to build and evaluate an expression tree from postfix notation.
keyPoints: Node structure definition with data and pointers
